title: Heliosperma pusillum
taxonomy: Heliosperma pusillum is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Cistaceae. It belongs to the genus Heliosperma and is native to the Mediterranean region. Heliosperma pusillum is a succulent perennial herb that produces small white or pink flowers. The plant is typically found growing in rocky outcrops and dry areas. Further classification includes its order, which is Saxifragales.
